name: context-menu
description: Long-press context menu with viewport-clamped positioning, destructive item support, and separator dividers.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of context menu item definitions to display.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a menu item.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element wrapped in a long-press Pressable.

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Screen-reader label for the long-press trigger Pressable.

props.name: menuStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the floating menu container.
